/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/X:SDT RECORD #3 RELEASED TO DEFENSE IN DISCOVERY/CONTD: RELEASE OF SDT RECORDS AND TO SET TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: SDT RECORDS RELEASED TO DISTRICT ATTORNEY/INVOFF: SGT GARY BUCKNER SFPD/WIT SWORN: OFF  MARKO RADIN SFPD/WIT SWORN: SGT GARY BUCKNER SFPD /EXHMA: PEO 1 PHOTO OF VICTIM/EXHMA: PEO 2 PHOTO OFRIGHT SIDE VICTIM/EXHMA: PEO 3 PHOTO OF DEFENDANTS MUGSHOT/EXHMA: PEO 4 PHOTO OF MEDICAL RECORDS/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, AREORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,//HTA1:001, 002, 003/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 04-13-22/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 04-04-22 (10TH)/X: COURT ESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 05-17-22/ACM/TE: 1HR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROMCUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/SA1: KAYLYN ALLAYA PERKINS COUNSIL AND ALLAYAH W,/SAORD2/SA2: 40 OSCEOLA LANE SF CA 94124/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD: DEFT MUST COMPLETE AT LEASET 2 ANGER MANAGEMENT SESSIONS PROOP TO THE NEXT CALLIN/CTORD: STAY AWAY ORDER MAY BE MODIFIED TO FACILITATE PEACEFUL CONTACT  WITH THE PROTECTED PERSONS, BUT ONLY IF ORDERED THROUGH THE FAMILY COURT/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING 03-30-22 DEPT 9/DOP/
/CAL:RULING OF RELEASE OF SDT RECORDS #1 & #2/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:PER PD'S REQUEST, ALL FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/
